title: Analytics
description: Competitive pressure, data quality, coverage gaps, and operational priorities — all from your imported signals.
unavailableDesc: Select a workspace and import some signals to unlock analytics.
notEnoughDataDesc: Import competitor newsletters or ads first. Once signals are flowing, this page will surface pressure, coverage gaps, attribution issues, and operational priorities.
competitorsActiveSub: With newsletter or ad activity in {{range}}
actionQueueDesc: High-value next steps from data freshness, coverage gaps, competitor pressure, and promo intensity.
noUrgentActions: No urgent actions detected. Keep importing signals to maintain visibility.
dataHealthAuditDesc: Whether the analytics layer is trustworthy enough for decisions or still needs cleanup.
shareOfMonitoredActivityDesc: Which competitors own the largest share of observed newsletter and ad signals.
detectedAnomaliesDesc: Behavior that materially departs from the recent baseline and deserves immediate review.
noAnomalies: No sharp anomalies detected in the current window.
promoFrequencyByCompetitorDesc: How often each competitor uses promotions relative to total newsletter volume. Reveals aggressive discounting strategies at a glance.
competitiveActivityByWeekDesc: Spot bursts in competitor campaigns, ad pushes, and insight generation over the last 12 weeks.
attributionHealthDesc: Inbox coverage quality. Unassigned newsletters indicate a missing or incomplete competitor record.
competitorPressureRankingDesc: Weighted by newsletter volume, ad activity, and promotions. High scores signal where the market is pushing hardest.
recentSignalsDesc: Latest newsletter, ad, and insight events that should shape today's decisions.
topSenderDomainsDesc: Domains carrying the most newsletter volume — the fastest way to spot attribution cleanup opportunities.
competitorCoverageAuditDesc: Competitors that still need domain setup, fresh signals, or more AI extraction depth.
discountPostureDesc: How aggressive the observed offer mechanics are, and how they distribute across recent campaigns.
newsletterCadenceByWeekdayDesc: Cadence concentration reveals competitor campaign send rhythm and likely planning windows.
insightCategoryMixDesc: Which strategic themes the AI layer is surfacing most often.
productCategoriesDesc: Categories most often mentioned across competitor newsletter analysis.
urgencyTacticsDesc: Which urgency signals appear most often in extracted newsletter campaigns.
